meta.name: Dhwani Everything Claude Code — Skill Graph
meta.description: 150+ skill AI agent library encoding Dhwani RIS domain knowledge, engineering standards, and product workflows

domain.label: Domain Knowledge
domain.description: India social sector domain expertise — CSR, FCRA, NGO operations, grant management

design.label: Design Skills
design.description: UI/UX/Architecture frameworks — anti-AI-slop aesthetics, accessibility, system design

product.label: Product Workflows
product.description: Dhwani RIS-specific PM, BA, engineering, and delivery workflows

builder.label: Builder / Technical
builder.description: Technical implementation patterns — Frappe, QA, DevOps, databases

templates.label: Templates & Guides
templates.description: Reference material — CLAUDE.md templates, spec skeletons, onboarding guides

csr-compliance-india.label: CSR Compliance India
csr-compliance-india.description: Companies Act 2013 Section 135, Schedule VII, 11 MCA reports, penalties, spend calculation, implementing agency rules
csr-compliance-india.when_to_use: Any conversation about Indian CSR law, MCA forms, Schedule VII
csr-compliance-india.when_not_to_use: Non-India contexts; technical implementation (use govt-csr-compliance instead)

ngo-operations.label: NGO Operations
ngo-operations.description: Trust/Society/Section 8 structures, 12A/80G/FCRA/DARPAN/CSR-1 registrations, governance, HR, procurement

development-sector-grants.label: Dev Sector Grants
development-sector-grants.description: Grant lifecycle (9 stages), Theory of Change, LogFrame, M&E, SDGs, SROI, due diligence
development-sector-grants.when_to_use: Program design, M&E planning, grant lifecycle
development-sector-grants.output: ToC, LogFrame, M&E plan, indicator design

grant-management-operations.label: Grant Mgmt Ops
grant-management-operations.description: Fund flow, UCs, SoEs, fund requests, budget management, grant closure, multi-donor apportionment
grant-management-operations.when_to_use: Fund flow, UCs, SoEs, budget tracking

fcra-compliance.label: FCRA Compliance
fcra-compliance.description: FCRA 2010 + 2020 amendments, designated SBI account, 20% admin cap, FC-4/FC-6, sub-granting ban
fcra-compliance.when_to_use: Foreign funding, FCRA registration, FC-4 filing

data-mis-design.label: Data & MIS Design
data-mis-design.description: Mobile data collection (ODK, KoBoToolbox, mForm), MIS design, dashboards, data governance, DPDP Act
data-mis-design.when_to_use: Building data collection systems, dashboards, MIS
data-mis-design.output: System design, indicator frameworks, DQA plans

frontend-designer.label: Frontend Designer
frontend-designer.description: Anti-AI-slop design, 30+ aesthetic tones, brand defaults, design thinking protocol
frontend-designer.when_to_use: Any new UI work, landing pages, dashboards
frontend-designer.when_not_to_use: Pure backend work; Frappe-only UI (use frappe-ui-design)

ux-reviewer.label: UX Reviewer
ux-reviewer.description: 10-priority UX review (accessibility→data viz), PASS/FAIL scoring per category

accessibility-auditor.label: Accessibility Auditor
accessibility-auditor.description: WCAG 2.1 AA audit/fix, contrast calculation, auto-fix mode, Dhwani brand validation
accessibility-auditor.when_to_use: WCAG compliance check, fixing a11y issues
accessibility-auditor.output: Violation report with WCAG criteria and fixes

react-composition-patterns.label: React Patterns
react-composition-patterns.description: Compound components, providers, React 19 changes, boolean prop elimination
react-composition-patterns.when_to_use: Refactoring React components with boolean prop sprawl

frappe-ui-design.label: Frappe UI Design
frappe-ui-design.description: ui.frappe.io components only, light theme, Dhwani brand, feature module scaffolding

system-architecture.label: System Architecture
system-architecture.description: 5-pillar thinking, 20-question framework, AI-aware decomposition, constraint navigation
system-architecture.when_to_use: Architecture decisions, integration planning, tech choices
system-architecture.output: Decision doc with trade-offs and alternatives

figma-to-powerbi.label: Figma → PowerBI
figma-to-powerbi.description: Converts Figma dashboard designs into functional PowerBI reports — theme JSON, layout spec, PBIR files, DAX measures
figma-to-powerbi.when_to_use: Converting Figma dashboard designs to PowerBI reports
figma-to-powerbi.when_not_to_use: Non-PowerBI targets; no Figma source exists
figma-to-powerbi.output: PowerBI theme JSON, PBIR scaffolding, implementation guide

dris-feature-spec.label: Feature Spec
dris-feature-spec.description: Idea → Structured feature spec (.docx). PM creates specs from raw ideas, user stories, or client input.
dris-feature-spec.when_to_use: PM has an idea or requirement to spec
dris-feature-spec.input: Raw idea, user stories, or client input

dris-technical-pm.label: Technical PM
dris-technical-pm.description: Spec → Solution architecture (COVE method). Full-stack PM: architect, data designer, product designer.
dris-technical-pm.when_not_to_use: No spec exists yet (use feature-spec first)

dris-business-analyst.label: Business Analyst
dris-business-analyst.description: Client inputs → BRD + Requirements Matrix. Structures raw client calls, emails, MOMs into formal requirements.
dris-business-analyst.when_to_use: Client call, email, or MOM needs structuring

brd-to-implementation-spec.label: BRD → Impl Spec
brd-to-implementation-spec.description: BRD → Claude Code-ready tech spec (6-phase). Transforms BRD into executable specification for Frappe v16 + Flutter.
brd-to-implementation-spec.when_to_use: BRD exists, needs a Claude Code-ready tech spec
brd-to-implementation-spec.output: Complete Frappe v16 tech spec with build phases

dris-frappe-doctype.label: Frappe DocType
dris-frappe-doctype.description: Spec → DocType JSON with workflows. Designs fields, permissions, approval chains for Frappe.

dris-pr-raiser.label: PR Raiser
dris-pr-raiser.description: Code → Clean GitHub PR. Structures code changes into reviewable pull requests.
dris-pr-raiser.when_to_use: Code is ready, needs a clean PR
dris-pr-raiser.when_not_to_use: Code isn't written yet; tests haven't passed
dris-pr-raiser.output: GitHub PR with description and test plan

dris-product-docs.label: Product Docs
dris-product-docs.description: Feature → Frappe Wiki chapter. Generates user documentation for completed features.

dris-email-drafter.label: Email Drafter
dris-email-drafter.description: Context → Pattern-based client email. Generates professional client communications.
dris-email-drafter.when_to_use: Client update, announcement, or follow-up needed

dris-weekly-update.label: Weekly Update
dris-weekly-update.description: Git + Linear → Weekly report (.docx). Reads actual commit history for accuracy.

dris-release-notes.label: Release Notes
dris-release-notes.description: Git + Linear → Release notes. Generates internal release notes and customer update emails.

dris-ticketing.label: Ticketing
dris-ticketing.description: Spec → Linear tickets (batch). Generates structured tickets from feature specs.
dris-ticketing.when_to_use: Spec or feature needs to become Linear tickets

dris-skill-selector.label: Skill Selector
dris-skill-selector.description: Any task → Correct agent. Central router that dispatches to the right skill based on task description.
dris-skill-selector.when_not_to_use: You already know which skill to use

dris-mgrant-donor.label: mGrant Donor
dris-mgrant-donor.description: mGrant Donor: 40+ DocTypes, 5 grant flows. Complete product context for the donor-facing platform.
dris-mgrant-donor.output: Product context, DocType knowledge, grant flows

dris-mgrant-csr.label: mGrant CSR
dris-mgrant-csr.description: mGrant CSR: MCA Section 135, budget lifecycle. CSR module with compliance context.

dris-mgrant-nuo.label: mGrant NuO
dris-mgrant-nuo.description: mGrant NuO: NGO grants, sub-grants, FCRA. The NGO-facing grant management platform.
dris-mgrant-nuo.output: NGO grant context, sub-grants, FCRA flows

dris-mgrant-bulk-upload.label: mGrant Bulk Upload
dris-mgrant-bulk-upload.description: Data import with PM gates. PREP-MAP-SAMPLE-EXECUTE methodology for safe bulk operations.

dris-mgrant-setup.label: mGrant Setup
dris-mgrant-setup.description: New mGrant deployment or client onboarding. 11-phase configuration sequence.
dris-mgrant-setup.when_to_use: New mGrant deployment or client onboarding

frappe-development.label: Frappe Development
frappe-development.description: DocType design, API security, hooks, testing — 500 lines of battle-tested Frappe patterns

qa-testing.label: QA Testing
qa-testing.description: Playwright E2E, POM, CI, permission testing — 569 lines of comprehensive test patterns

devops-loadtesting.label: Load Testing
devops-loadtesting.description: k6, Locust, monitoring — performance testing patterns

govt-csr-compliance.label: Tech CSR Compliance
govt-csr-compliance.description: Technical: audit trails, PII handling, RBAC, WCAG — implementation-level compliance

documentation-workflow.label: Doc Workflow
documentation-workflow.description: API docs, user guides, release notes workflow

claude-template.label: CLAUDE.md Template
claude-template.description: Generator prompt for CLAUDE.md in any repo — project context, session log, architecture decisions
claude-template.when_not_to_use: CLAUDE.md already exists and is maintained

evals-template.label: Evals Template
evals-template.description: Skill evaluation test framework — 3+ test cases minimum per skill

spec-template.label: Spec Template
spec-template.description: Technical spec skeleton — 13 sections + 3 appendices. Battle-tested for Frappe v16.

tooling-reference.label: Tooling Reference
tooling-reference.description: ECC + Autoresearch + Paperclip install and usage guide

vibe-coding-how-to.label: Vibe Coding Guide
vibe-coding-how-to.description: Non-technical vibe coding guide — onboarding PMs to Claude Code

skill-authoring-standards.label: Skill Authoring
skill-authoring-standards.description: How to write/test/maintain skills — frontmatter, evals, semver

edges.reason: NGOs receiving both CSR and foreign funds need both frameworks
CSR fund flow follows grant management principles
Implementing agencies must be registered
CSR projects use the same program design
FCRA is one of several NGO registrations
Foreign grants add designated account and admin cap
Conceptual vs operational split
M&E frameworks define what; MIS implements how
NGO data management capacity is a due diligence criterion
Grant MIS integrates financial + programmatic data
Design → review for UX quality
UX review → accessibility deep-dive
Accessibility findings feed into Frappe corrections
Pattern knowledge improves architecture decisions
Architecture thinking feeds into spec generation
Frontend designer creates the Figma dashboard
UX review ensures solid design before conversion
BRD from BA feeds into feature spec
Feature spec feeds into solution architecture
Architecture feeds into Claude Code-ready spec
Architecture decisions become Linear tickets
Tech spec feeds into DocType design
DocType design feeds into code writing
Code feeds into QA testing
Tests pass → raise PR
PR merged → write release notes
Release notes → client update email
Feature spec can directly generate tickets
Weekly update data feeds into emails
Donor product context needs grant ops knowledge
Donor product handles CSR compliance
CSR module needs CSR legal framework
NuO handles FCRA-compliant NGO grants
NuO needs NGO governance context
Spec generation uses architectural thinking
DocType design benefits from UI thinking
Technical implementation ↔ legal framework
Bulk upload benefits from MIS data quality knowledge

golden_path.description: The primary workflow from client call to shipped code + client communication

context_loading_point.note: Domain context loaded as needed before DocType design

design_review_chain.note: Design review runs in parallel with QA for UI features

pm.label: Product Manager
pm.description: Starting a new feature or unsure where to begin

ba.label: Business Analyst
ba.description: Processing client call, email, or MOM
